name: create_project
full_help:
create_project

Description: 
Create a new project

Syntax: 
create_project  [-part <arg>] [-force] [-in_memory] [-ip] [-rtl_kernel]
                [-quiet] [-verbose] [<name>] [<dir>]

Returns: 
new project object

Usage: 
  Name           Description
  --------------------------
  [-part]        Target part
  [-force]       Overwrite existing project directory
  [-in_memory]   Create an in-memory project
  [-ip]          Default GUI behavior is for a managed IP project
  [-rtl_kernel]  Default GUI behavior is for a RTL Kernel project
  [-quiet]       Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]     Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<name>]       Project name
  [<dir>]        Directory where the project file is saved
                 Default: .

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Default GUI behavior is for a managed IP project
